3038500.name: Cooking Simulator 2: Prologue
3038500.description:
Cooking Simulator 2: Better Together Prologue is a free introduction to the full game. 

 
It offers a focused slice of the core gameplay, early progression, and first challenges, giving you a hands-on preview of what the complete experience will deliver. 

This Prologue is designed to let you learn the basics, try key systems, and decide how you want to cook, completely free of charge. 

 

Start Your Culinary Journey 

Your journey begins in a small burger joint, where you will learn the fundamentals of cooking, ingredient handling, and kitchen workflow. Serve different guests, meet their expectations, and start building your reputation as a chef. Creativity and efficiency are the keys to success. 

 

Experiment With Recipes 

Cooking is about more than following instructions. 
In the Prologue, you can experiment with recipes by adjusting ingredients, techniques, and preparation methods. Discover what works best for your guests and develop your own approach to cooking. 

If you prefer guidance, you can also unlock and use recipes inspired by real dishes from around the world. Each one can be adjusted with simple changes to suit different tastes. 

 

Manage the Kitchen 

Cooking is only part of the job. Order supplies before you run out, prepare ingredients ahead of service, and keep your workstations clean and organized. A well-managed kitchen helps you stay efficient and keeps your guests happy. 

 

Learn the Basics of Real Cooking 

Use professional kitchen equipment and fresh ingredients to prepare your dishes. Control heat, manage timing, choose the right cuts, and avoid common mistakes like burning food or serving it undercooked. Assemble and plate your dishes the way you like, and finish them with the right final touch. 

 

Prologue Features 

Free Prologue Experience 
Play the first stage of the game at no cost 

Introduction to Core Systems 
Learn cooking, prep, timing, and kitchen management 

Recipe Experimentation 
Modify recipes, ingredients, and techniques 

Recipe Collection 
Unlock dishes inspired by cuisines from around the world 

Kitchen Management Basics 
Order supplies, prep ingredients, and keep stations clean 

Professional Cooking Tools 
Use real kitchen equipment with heat and timing control 

Early Quests and Progression 
Experience the opening challenges of the full game 

 

Cooking Simulator 2: Better Together Prologue is the perfect way to step into the kitchen, learn the fundamentals, and get a taste of what the full game has to offer.
3038500.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 简体中文, 日语, 韩语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语, 土耳其语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
